title: Payment flow has no pre-payment trust check
reason: The project can move money, but Monarch is not called before payment.

title: Verified endpoint, low risk
reason: Endpoint ownership, pay-to wallet, and delivery reliability are verified.

title: Unknown wrapper
reason: Endpoint appears reachable, but provider authorization is not visible.

title: Changed pay-to wallet
reason: The endpoint recently changed its payment destination.

title: Endpoint accepts payment but fails delivery
reason: Recent paid calls did not consistently return usable responses.

title: Risky endpoint with verified alternative
reason: A lower-risk verified alternative can satisfy the same intent.
